description: An alarm sitting in INSUFFICIENT_DATA because the metric stops publishing during the failure.
body: Failure mode: an alarm is configured with treatMissingData:missing on a metric that goes silent exactly when the system breaks, so the alarm never fires. Detection signals: alarm stuck in INSUFFICIENT_DATA during an incident, no notification despite user-visible failure, gaps in the metric graph. Do not assume no alarm means no problem. Safer fallback: set treatMissingData:breaching for liveness-style metrics, add a complementary alarm on a metric that is always emitted (e.g. invocation count hitting zero), and verify with a fault injection.
